stories.title: 'It's going to be such a good Sunday': Stage set f...
stories.summary: With 21 players within four shots of leader Alex Smalley, Sunday figures to be unpredictable and chaotic.

stories.title: Rousey submits Carano by armbar in 17 seconds
stories.summary: Ronda Rousey's first MMA fight in 10 years lasted only 17 seconds, as the former UFC champion quickly submitted Gina Carano via armbar to win their main event bout.

stories.title: Sources: Rodgers to sign 1-year deal with Steelers...
stories.summary: Four-time MVP Aaron Rodgers is expected to return the Steelers on a one-year deal worth up to $25 million, sources told ESPN.

stories.title: McGregor books July 11 return against Holloway
stories.summary: Conor McGregor will make his much-anticipated return to the Octagon on July 11 against Max Holloway in a nontitle welterweight bout at UFC 329.

stories.title: Goalie change fuels rally as Sabres force Game 7
stories.summary: Ukko-Pekka Luukkonen made 18 saves after starter Alex Lyon stopped only one of the four shots he faced, and the Sabres roared back to defeat the Canadiens 8-3 to force a Game 7 in this Eastern Conference semifinal series.
